name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 88 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction (including marble-origami reversible collapse), MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.118 (/fork background subagent command inheriting full conversation + 'f' keybinding + implicit fork subagent type, CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT env + tengu_copper_fox GB flag + CLAUDE_BRIDGE_REATTACH_SESSION/SEQ bridge plumbing, /cost and /stats folded into /usage aliases with dual interactive/headless registrations, cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07 prompt cache diagnostics API beta with graceful server-reject, frontmatter shadow validator emitting tengu_frontmatter_shadow telemetry for drift detection, WIF user-OAuth advisory file-locking for multi-process token refresh, dark-launched /pro-trial-expired, CLAUDE_CODE_RATE_LIMIT_TIER/SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE overrides, /autocompact and /stop-hook removed, OIDC Federation enterprise auth with credentials-file profiles, CLAUDE_CODE_HTTP(S)_PROXY fallbacks with downstream npm/yarn/docker/Java propagation, /model slash command headless mode, server-side Advisor Tool, PushNotification + KAIROS mobile push, Context Hint API server-driven micro-compaction, Fullscreen TUI with /focus /tui and DECSTBM scrolling regions, Proxy Auth Helper, System Prompt GB Override, /fewer-permission-prompts, canary channel, slow first-byte watchdog, async-agent stall watchdog, Remote Workflow Commands /autopilot /bugfix /dashboard /docs /investigate sunset in v2.1.113).
